claim: Staff notation catalogue = dictionary of music symbols, scales, intervals, PD motif seeds — geometry-linked, rights-clean.

rights.theory: Music-theoretic facts (scales, intervals, clefs) are not copyrightable as pure facts.
rights.motifs: Motif seeds are short PD phrases for education/geometry only — not full commercial scores.
rights.noLyrics: No commercial lyric text in this catalogue.
